name: Multi-Agent Research System
description: Parallel research agents + synthesis: decompose query, fan out to specialized agents, synthesize

nodes.label: Decomposer
nodes.notes: Break query into 3-5 sub-questions. Assign each to a specialized agent.

nodes.label: Academic Agent
nodes.notes: Search arXiv + Semantic Scholar for papers

nodes.label: Code Agent
nodes.notes: Find reference implementations, run code examples

nodes.label: Synthesizer
nodes.notes: Merge all agent findings. Resolve conflicts. Build coherent answer with citations.

nodes.label: Critic
nodes.notes: Adversarial review: fact-check claims, identify gaps, flag low-confidence sections

nodes.label: Quality OK?
nodes.notes: Yes if critic confidence > 0.8. No if major gaps found.

nodes.label: Research Report
nodes.notes: Final comprehensive research report with citations

nodes.label: Gap Filler
nodes.notes: Fill specific gaps identified by critic, loop back to synthesizer
